results.rendered_html:
sūdana (von 1. sūd)
1〉 adj.
a〉 richtig führend: aśva  ṚV. 4,39,5 .
— b〉 den Garaus machend, vernichtend  PAÑCAR. 3,2,2 . in comp. mit seinem Object: dānava˚  MBH. 1,1177 . arigaṇa˚ 5381 . 5430 . 2,1214 . 3,2525 . 8666 . 16996 . 4,160 . 5,445 . 16,52 .  R. 1,1,56 . 52,8 . 53,1 . 2,110,15 . 3,30,46 . 32,9 . 33,23 .  KATHĀS. 27,81 . 120,11 .  BHĀG. P. 9,15,31 .  TRIK. 1,1,33 . [Page7-1167] krauñca˚  SUŚR. 2,386,10 . viṣa˚ 1,227,20,228,6 . f. ā  HARIV. 13163 . ī  KATHĀS. 37,46 .  ŚATR. 1,166 .
— 2〉 n. das Garausmachen, Vernichten  HALĀY. 2,322 . tataḥ sa sūdanaṃ cakre vānarāṇām  R. 6,77,7 . asura˚  HARIV. 9402 .
— Vgl. ariṣṭa˚, asura˚, kuṣṭha˚, pāpa˚, bala˚. madhu˚, vala˚ (auch  MBH. 13,3903 ), havya˚.

results.rendered_html:
sūdana a. (nī f.) [sūd-bhāva lyuṭ]
1 Destroying, killing, destructive; dānavasūdana, arigaṇasūdana &c.
2 Dear, beloved.
— naṃ
1 Destroying,
(pb) destruction, massacre.
2 Assenting to, promising.
3 Ejecting, throwing away.
